title: ASP.NET controller actions should avoid having a route template starting with /
description: Routing in ASP.NET Core MVC maps controllers and actions to paths in request URIs. Similar routing happens in ASP.NET Framework MVC. In ASP.NET Core MVC, when an action defines a route template starting with a "/", the route is considered absolute and the action is registered at the root of the web application.
recommendation: Refactor to eliminate the flagged pattern.

checks.message: ASP.NET Controller actions should avoid having a route template starting with /.
